servicesOverviewHeader.heading: Our Services
servicesOverviewHeader.subheading: From enterprise-grade platforms to immersive gamification—we deliver the full spectrum of digital innovation.

servicesOverviewAccordion.title: Enterprise & B2G Solutions
servicesOverviewAccordion.description: We architect robust, secure, and scalable software ecosystems for enterprises and government institutions. Our solutions are built to handle mission-critical operations with zero compromise on performance or security.

servicesOverviewAccordion.title: Gamification & Games
servicesOverviewAccordion.description: We create immersive, gamified experiences that drive engagement, boost brand recall, and deliver measurable ROI through interactive play. From motion-sensor games to AR activations, we turn physical spaces into digital playgrounds.

servicesOverviewAccordion.title: Interactive Experiences
servicesOverviewAccordion.description: We maximize the potential of MJ Solution hardware by creating immersive software that merges the physical and digital worlds. From smart wayfinding to VR simulators, we transform spaces into intelligent environments.

servicesOverviewAccordion.title: Digital Strategy & Consulting
servicesOverviewAccordion.description: We are long-term partners, not just vendors. Our consulting practice helps organizations navigate the digital transformation journey with confidence—from legacy system audits to full-scale UI/UX redesigns.

hero.title: Enterprise & B2G Solutions
hero.desc: We architect robust, secure, and scalable software ecosystems for enterprises and government institutions. Our solutions handle mission-critical operations with zero compromise.

capabilities.title: Bespoke Web & Mobile Development
capabilities.desc: High-performance internal applications (HRIS, CRM, Project Management) tailored to your specific business logic. We build systems that scale from 10 to 10,000 users.

capabilities.title: Smart Dashboard & Data Visualization
capabilities.desc: Transform complex big data into actionable insights with real-time visual dashboards, perfect for Command Centers and Government monitoring.

capabilities.title: Custom CMS
capabilities.desc: Centralized control for your entire digital network, allowing seamless content updates across thousands of devices from a single console.

capabilities.title: Asset & Inventory Management
capabilities.desc: Digital tracking solutions using QR/RFID integration to secure and monitor high-value corporate assets in real time.

hero.title: Gamification & Games
hero.desc: We create immersive, gamified experiences that drive engagement, boost brand recall, and deliver measurable ROI through interactive play.

capabilities.title: Kinetic & Gesture-Based Games
capabilities.desc: Interactive experiences driven by motion sensors (Kinect/Lidar), turning lobbies into active brand playgrounds that captivate visitors.

capabilities.title: Augmented Reality Activation
capabilities.desc: Overlaying digital magic onto the real world—perfect for product launches, property marketing (AR Booklets), and retail experiences.

capabilities.title: Social Wall & Live Feeds
capabilities.desc: Real-time social media integration that displays audience content on your LED screens, driving organic digital traction and engagement.

capabilities.title: Phygital Leaderboards
capabilities.desc: Competitive gaming hubs that sync visitors' smartphones with large-scale displays for instant rewards and data collection.

hero.title: Interactive Experiences
hero.desc: We maximize the potential of MJ Solution hardware by creating immersive software experiences that merge the physical and digital worlds.

hotspots.title: Wayfinding Kiosk
hotspots.desc: Interactive map with route calculation and live directory.

hotspots.title: AR Activation
hotspots.desc: Augmented reality overlay triggered by user presence.

hotspots.title: 360° Camera
hotspots.desc: Captures the entire space for digital twin recreation.

useCases.title: Shopping Malls
useCases.desc: Interactive directory kiosks with real-time promotions displayed on LED videowalls.

useCases.title: Museums & Galleries
useCases.desc: Multi-touch exhibition tables with gestural zoom, timelines, and audio guides.

useCases.title: Corporate Lobbies
useCases.desc: Motion-sensor activated welcome displays with live visitor dashboards.

capabilities.title: Smart Wayfinding & Concierge
capabilities.desc: Intelligent navigation systems for malls, hospitals, and government hubs using interactive touchscreen kiosks.

capabilities.title: Virtual Reality Simulators
capabilities.desc: Immersive training or virtual property tours (360° walkthroughs) that provide a hands-on experience without limits.

capabilities.title: Interactive Exhibition Modules
capabilities.desc: Multi-touch software designed for museums and galleries, allowing deep exploration of digital archives.

capabilities.title: IoT & Hardware Integration
capabilities.desc: Custom middleware that connects your software to physical sensors, lighting, or mechanical elements.

hero.title: Digital Strategy
hero.desc: We are long-term partners, not just vendors. Our consulting practice helps organizations navigate the digital transformation journey with confidence.

roadmap.title: Audit & Discovery
roadmap.desc: Deep analysis of existing systems, pain points, and stakeholder interviews.

roadmap.title: Strategy & Architecture
roadmap.desc: Defining the technology stack, data flow architecture, and migration plan.

roadmap.title: Design & Prototype
roadmap.desc: High-fidelity UI/UX design, user testing, and interactive prototyping.

roadmap.title: Agile Development
roadmap.desc: Sprint-based development with transparent progress reporting and demos.

roadmap.title: QA & Launch
roadmap.desc: Rigorous testing (Whitebox, Blackbox, Bulk), soft launch, and full deployment.

roadmap.title: Growth & Support
roadmap.desc: Continuous monitoring, feature iteration, and 24/7 SLA maintenance.

capabilities.title: Digital Transformation Roadmap
capabilities.desc: We don't just build; we advise. We help institutions transition from manual legacy systems to automated digital workflows with a clear, phased roadmap.

capabilities.title: UI/UX Design Lab
capabilities.desc: Crafting user-centric interfaces that are not only beautiful but also intuitive for various demographics—from Gen Z to Government officials.
